chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA 140 of 2025 SCRA 141 of 2025 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For hearing of main case. 3. For hearing of CMA No.1295/2025. 12.11.2025 Sardar Zafar Hussain, advocate for the applicant. Rana Sakhawat Ali, advocate for the respondent in SCRA 140 of 2025. It is jointly submitted that the impugned order is bereft of relevant discussion and deliberation on the issue between the parties. It is further stated that the same could not be considered as a speaking order. Counsel jointly seek that it would be in the interest of justice of all parties concerned if the impugned order is set aside and the matter is remanded for adjudication afresh expeditiously preferably within 30 days. Counsel for the respondent further seeks that pending the aforesaid, no further coercive action be taken against the respondent arising here from. Counsel for the applicant has no cavil to such proposal and states that the reference application may be disposed of as aforesaid. Order accordingly. A copy of this decision may also be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Office is instructed to place copy hereof in the connected file. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
